name: prefs-hook
description: UserPromptSubmit + SessionStart + PreCompact + PostCompact hook — injects the user's current language preferences (3 axes: code authoring · doc authoring · response language) as additionalContext from the FIXED SSOT `~/.claude/plugins/data/prefs-sidecar/prefs.json` (written by the `prefs` command plugin); UserPromptSubmit re-injects every turn so the preference never fades from context. Implemented in hexa-lang (`_prefs.hexa inject`, via `hexa run`). Hook half of the prefs split — the `/prefs` show/set command is the `prefs` command plugin, reading/writing the same fixed prefs.json SSOT so split-safe. NO opt-out by design.
